extraction.one_line_summary: KRON Andreas won Stage 6 after Luigi GOSTA was disqualified for irregular sprinting, with the sprint drifting from right to left across the road.
tactical_patterns: Sprint positioning drifted significantly from right side to left side of road, suggesting either wind effect or leadout collapse created chaos.

rider_signals.KRON Andreas: positive: recovered from illness-related form drop post-Catalunya, showing resilience to bounce back within same stage race after poor previous day
rider_signals.GOSTA Luigi: negative: disqualified for irregular sprint, suggesting either desperation move or poor spatial awareness under fatigue in finishing straight
